title: SAP Inhouse Consultant PP (full time/f/m/d)
description:
Your tasks
  • SAP inhouse consultant as leading role for the Module PP
  • Conception, customization & implementation of companywide SAP processes in cooperation with the respective departments
  • Close collaboration with Business Process Owners / Global Key Users, including training of key users
  • 2nd and 3rd level support for international SAP key users
  • Ensure seamless integration of SAP PP with other modules like SD, MM, WM, QM, FI, CO and MES System
  • Coordination and close cooperation with other inhouse consultants, external module consultants & developers


Your experience
  • Several years of experience as an (inhouse) consultant in the SAP area
  • Advanced knowledge in SAP customizing (PP)
  • Experience in reading and debugging SAP ABAP code
  • Profound experience in project management and ability to lead work packages effectively
  • Teamwork and reliability
  • Business fluent English language skills, German skills are an advantage


Your benefits
  • Training, development opportunities and a comprehensive range of social benefits
  • A friendly and dynamic team environment characterized by technical experts
  • Intercultural exchange while working across countries
  • Up to 2 days per week remote work (Home office)

We have exciting plans for our future and offer fascinating areas of responsibility at an international group. If you are willing to be actively involved in the further development of delfort, we are looking forward to receiving your complete application documents. This position comes with a minimum salary accordingly to Austrian collective bargaining agreement of EUR 4.141,24. We offer overpayment and an attractive benefits package based on experience.
